---
title: "dice"
generated: true
description: "Soft Sørensen--Dice overlap coefficient."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.metrics.overlap`](../nitrix-metrics-overlap.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:dice -->
```python
dice(pred: Float[Array, '...'], target: Float[Array, '...'], *, axis: Optional[_AxisArg] = None, smooth: float = 1e-07, reduction: Reduction = 'mean') -> Float[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:dice -->
Soft Sørensen--Dice overlap coefficient.

For soft masks `p` (`pred`) and `t` (`target`) the
coefficient over the summed region is

$(2 \sum p\, t + s) / (\sum p + \sum t + s)$

with $s$ the value of `smooth`.  Values lie in
$[0, 1]$; $1$ is a perfect overlap.  Use
$1 - \mathrm{dice}$ as a loss.

The inputs are treated as soft masks and are *not* activated here:
pass class probabilities (e.g. a softmax) against a one-hot target
for the multi-class case, or a sigmoid against a
$\{0, 1\}$ target for the binary case.  Keeping the
activation in the caller leaves
this a pure overlap measure.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:dice -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `pred` | `Float` | `...` | — | Soft masks of identical shape. |
| `target` | `Float` | `...` | — | Soft masks of identical shape. |
| `axis` | `Optional[_AxisArg]` | — | `None` | Axes that span a single overlap region (summed in the numerator and denominator). `None` (default) sums over the whole tensor for one global coefficient; pass the spatial axes (e.g. `axis=(-3, -2, -1)` on a `(batch, class, *spatial)` volume) for a per-`(batch, class)` coefficient. |
| `smooth` | `float` | — | `1e-07` | Laplace smoothing added to both numerator and denominator. Besides guarding the empty-mask denominator, adding it to the numerator makes an empty prediction against an empty target score exactly `1` (vacuously perfect) rather than `0/0`. |
| `reduction` | `Reduction` | — | `'mean'` | `"mean"` (default), `"sum"`, or `"none"` applied to the per-region coefficient array. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:dice -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
